title: Cosmological sector programme (Lambda, dark sector)
statement: Cosmological-constant / dark-energy / dark-sector phenomenology stands at strong-evidence grade (legacy Pillar-11); no pre-registered prediction exists yet (GAP-4 open).
scope: Programme-grade; postdictions only. Nothing here counts as a prediction until a freeze is registered.
falsifier: Pre-registered observation gates per the prediction ledger (PRED-DM, PRED-GW) firing negative after freeze.
next_action: Select the first freeze candidate (PRED-DM or PRED-GW) and register its input set.
